projectDescription: A local-first continual learning system that turns everyday computer activity into durable, private memory and context for AI agents.
keyFeatures: Continuous capture of desktop activity via Electron app
Local-first encrypted SQLite storage — data never leaves your machine by default
Automatic PII redaction before any data is stored
Observation chunking that converts raw activity into structured memory
Intent tracking to follow evolving goals and tasks over time
Long-horizon task mining across work sessions
Agent handoff preparation — generates rich context summaries for AI agents
Bridge for optional server sync and Tinfoil inference via encrypted egress
publicApiSurface: Desktop app: privacy controls (blocklist apps, domains, time windows)
Desktop app: memory review interface (browse observations, intents, tasks)
Bridge: account sign-in / sign-out via WorkOS
